---
title: "CLIF ICU Dashboard"
format: 
  html:
    theme: sandstone
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    html: 
      allow-raw-html: true
execute:
  enabled: true
  freeze: true
  echo: false
resources:
  - images/
---


# ICU Patient Encounter Characteristics and Outcomes (2020–2021)

The table below showcases the characteristics and outcomes of ICU patient encounters across nine CLIF consortium sites. The cohort includes all adults (≥ 18 years) admitted to an ICU within 48 hours of hospitalization and staying at least 24 hours, from January 1, 2020, to December 31, 2021. This represents a diverse cohort of over 111,000 ICU patient encounters.

```{ojs}
// Years available
// Ensure it's a string for the lookup to work
// viewof selectedYear = Inputs.select(["2022", "2023", "2024"], {
//   label: "Select Year",
//   value: "2024"
// })

// Extract university names (i.e., column names excluding 'Characteristic')
// universities = Object.keys(data[0]).filter(k => !["Variable", "Aggregate"].includes(k))

// // Dropdown for university selection
// viewof selectedUniversity = Inputs.select(
//   ["None", ...universities], {
//     label: "Select University",
//     value: "None"
//   }
// )

// Load only 2024 data (remove year selector)
data = FileAttachment("CLIF-TableOne/combined_overall_all_sites.csv").csv()

// Extract university names (i.e., column names excluding 'Characteristic')
universities = Object.keys(data[0]).filter(k => !["Variable", "Consortium Aggregate"].includes(k))

// Dropdown for university selection — default to "Overall" (= Consortium)
viewof selectedUniversity = Inputs.select(
  ["Overall", ...universities], {
    label: "Select University",
    value: "Overall"
  }
)


// Preload all CSV attachments
// files = ({
//   "2022": FileAttachment("CLIF-TableOne/combined_2022_all_sites_with_agg.csv"),
//   "2023": FileAttachment("CLIF-TableOne/combined_2023_all_sites_with_agg.csv"),
//   "2024": FileAttachment("CLIF-TableOne/combined_2024_all_sites_with_agg.csv")
// })

// // Select and load CSV for selected year
// data = files[selectedYear].csv()





```



```{ojs}

// Optionally convert data for plotting (transpose)
// Inputs.table(
//   selectedUniversity === "None"
//     ? data
//     : data.map(d => ({
//         Variable: d.Variable,
//         [selectedUniversity]: d[selectedUniversity]
//       }))
// )

htl.html`<div style="height: 2rem;"></div>`

// Use Consortium values if "None" is selected
// Use Consortium values if "Overall" is selected
sourceColumn = selectedUniversity === "Overall" ? "Consortium Aggregate" : selectedUniversity

summary = Object.fromEntries(
  data.map(d => [d.Variable, d[sourceColumn]])
)

extractPercent = str => {
  const match = /\(([\d.]+)\)/.exec(str);
  return match ? parseFloat(match[1]) : NaN;
}

donutData = Object.keys(summary)
  .filter(k => k.startsWith("First location of intubation n (%):"))
  .map(k => ({
    name: k.replace("First location of intubation n (%):", "").trim(),
    value: extractPercent(summary[k])
  }))
  .filter(d => !isNaN(d.value))


// // Race categories you'd like to include
// first_intubation_locations = [
//     "First location of intubation n (%): icu",
//     "First location of intubation n (%): ed",
//     "First location of intubation n (%): procedural",
//     "First location of intubation n (%): stepdown",
//     "First location of intubation n (%): ward",
//     "First location of intubation n (%): radiology",
//     "First location of intubation n (%): dialysis",
//     "First location of intubation n (%): other",
// ]





htl.html`
<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem 2rem; font-family: sans-serif;">
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <img src="../images/totalicus.png" alt="icon" style="width: 96px; height: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
  <div><strong>${summary["N: ICU encounters"]}</strong><br/>Total ICU encounters in the cohort</div></div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <img src="../images/ttl_patients.png" alt="icon" style="width: 96px; height: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
  <div><strong>${summary["N: unique patients"]}</strong><br/>Total unique patients in the cohort</div></div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <img src="../images/gender.png" alt="icon" style="width: 96px; height: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
  <div><strong>${summary["Sex n (%): Female"]}%</strong><br/>Female</div></div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <img src="../images/race.png" alt="icon" style="width: 96px; height: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
  <div><strong>${summary["Race n (%): Black"]}%</strong><br/>Race: black</div></div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <img src="../images/race.png" alt="icon" style="width: 96px; height: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
  <div><strong>${summary["Race n (%): White"]}%</strong><br/>Race: White</div></div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <img src="../images/race.png" alt="icon" style="width: 96px; height: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
  <div><strong>${summary["Race n (%): Other"]}%</strong><br/>Race: Other</div></div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" alt="icon" style="width: 96px; height: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
  <div><strong>${summary["Ethnicity n (%): Hispanic"]}</strong><br/>Ethnicity: Hispanic</div></div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <div><strong>${summary["Total ICU days, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Total ICU days, median [Q1,Q3]</div></div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <div><strong>${summary["Total hospital days, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Total hospital days, median [Q1,Q3]</div></div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <img src="../images/death.jpg" alt="icon" style="width: 96px; height: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
  <div><strong>${summary["Hospital mortality n (%)"]}</strong><br/>Mortality</div></div>
  <div><strong>${summary["SOFA-97 TOTAL, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>SOFA-97 TOTAL, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Admission Location n (%): ed"]}%</strong><br/>Admission Location n (%): ed</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Admission Location n (%): procedural"]}%</strong><br/>Admission Location n (%): procedural</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Admission Location n (%): icu"]}%</strong><br/>Admission Location n (%): icu</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Admission Location n (%): stepdown"]}%</strong><br/>Admission Location n (%): stepdown</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Admission Location n (%): ward"]}%</strong><br/>Admission Location n (%): ward</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Admission Location n (%): psych"]}</strong><br/>Admission Location n (%): psych</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Admission Location n (%): other"]}%</strong><br/>Admission Location n (%): other</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Vasopressor encounters n (%)"]}%</strong><br/>Vasopressor encounters n (%)</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Dopamine dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Dopamine dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Epinephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Epinephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Norepinephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Norepinephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Phenylephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Phenylephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Vasopressin dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Vasopressin dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Angiotensin dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>Angiotensin dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["IMV encounters n (%)"]}</strong><br/>MV encounters n (%)</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["First location of intubation n (%): icu"]}</strong><br/>First location of intubation n (%): icu</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["First location of intubation n (%): ed"]}</strong><br/>First location of intubation n (%): ed</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["First location of intubation n (%): procedural"]}</strong><br/>First location of intubation n (%): procedural</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["First location of intubation n (%): stepdown"]}</strong><br/>First location of intubation n (%): stepdown</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["First location of intubation n (%): ward"]}</strong><br/>First location of intubation n (%): ward</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["First location of intubation n (%): radiology"]}</strong><br/>First location of intubation n (%): radiology</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["First location of intubation n (%): dialysis"]}</strong><br/>First location of intubation n (%): dialysis</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["First location of intubation n (%): other"]}</strong><br/>First location of intubation n (%): other</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["First location of intubation n (%): l&d"]}</strong><br/>First location of intubation n (%): l&d</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): assist control-volume control"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): assist control-volume control</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): simv"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): simv</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): pressure support/cpap"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): pressure support/cpap</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): No mode documented"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): No mode documented</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): pressure control"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): pressure control</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): other"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): other</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): pressure-regulated volume control"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): pressure-regulated volume control</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): volume support"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): volume support</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): aprv"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): aprv</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["Initial mode for IMV n (%): blow by"]}</strong><br/>Initial mode for IMV n (%): blow by</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["fio2_set, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>fio2_set, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["peep_set, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>peep_set, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["resp_rate_set, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>resp_rate_set, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  <div><strong>${summary["tidal_volume_set, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>tidal_volume_set, median [Q1,Q3]</div>







`

htl.html`<div style="height: 2rem;"></div>`
```

```{ojs}
// Inject donutData as JSON into HTML for D3 to read
htl.html`<script id="donut-data" type="application/json">${JSON.stringify(donutData)}</script>`


```

```{ojs}
import {htl} from "@observablehq/runtime"

chart = {
  const width = 300;
  const height = 300;
  const radius = Math.min(width, height) / 2;

  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("width", width)
    .attr("height", height)
    .attr("viewBox", [-width / 2, -height / 2, width, height])
    .style("max-width", "100%")
    .style("height", "auto");

  const arc = d3.arc()
    .innerRadius(radius * 0.6)
    .outerRadius(radius);

  const pie = d3.pie()
    .sort(null)
    .value(d => +d.value);

  const color = d3.scaleOrdinal()
    .domain(donutData.map(d => d.name))
    .range(d3.schemeTableau10);

  svg.append("g")
    .selectAll("path")
    .data(pie(donutData))
    .join("path")
      .attr("fill", d => color(d.data.name))
      .attr("d", arc);

  svg.append("text")
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("dy", "0.35em")
    .style("font-size", "1.2rem")
    .text("Total");


  return svg.node();
}

chart
```
